translations.installHint: This installation does not have an admin account yet. Create the first admin user now. Enter the SECRET_KEY from the .env file as the owner proof. The SECRET_KEY is not stored in the browser and is not written from the form into .env.
translations.installSecretKeyHint: The install script prints this value at the end. It proves that you have access to the server configuration.
translations.installSecretKeyRequired: Please enter the SECRET_KEY from the .env file.
translations.installCompleteLoginNow: Admin has been created. Please sign in now.
translations.loginHint: Sign in with the configured admin or viewer account. Successful logins stay active for 7 days by default. Initial credentials are no longer stored in the .env file.
translations.githubRepositoryHint: Project page, source code and updates are available in the GitHub repository.
translations.helpHint: This help page shows the README documentation directly inside the application. The language follows the current language selection in the header.
translations.helpLoadFailed: Help documentation could not be loaded.
translations.achievementGoLive: 🪖 Go-live: great, it runs — but you are still on the dark side of the power!
translations.achievementFirstSolar: ☀️ First solar power: on the way to your electricity empire!
translations.achievementCoffee: ☕ Coffee fund unlocked: you have already saved enough for a coffee!
translations.achievementCake: 🍰 Cake level reached: the sun is buying you a slice of cake.
translations.achievementPizza: 🍕 Pizza power: your system has earned a pizza.
translations.achievementMovie: 🎬 Movie night: the sun nearly paid your ticket.
translations.achievementPlant: 🌱 Plant friend: your savings are looking nicely green.
translations.achievementGadget: 🔌 Gadget bonus: enough for a small smart-home gadget.
translations.achievementDinner: 🍽️ Solar dinner: your PV is saving its way toward dinner.
translations.achievementAmortization25: 🚀 Quarter complete: 25% of your investment is back.
translations.achievementAmortization75: 🛡️ Almost there: 75% of the investment is back.
translations.achievementAmortization100: 🏆 Break-even: your system has paid for itself!
translations.gridShareGaugeSubtitle: shows how much of the current power comes from grid import and solar
translations.financeCalculationHint: Calculation: consumption cost = import × kWh price. Savings = solar production × kWh price. Daily values use the daily balance; total values use permanently stored daily aggregates and current counters.
translations.name: Name
translations.languageHint: This setting applies to the entire web interface. German is the default language.
translations.timezoneHint: The time zone is used for time values in the web interface and for the Kindle PNG. Daylight saving time / winter time is handled automatically by the IANA time zone.
translations.userAccessHint: The admin is created during initial setup. A viewer can optionally be created or changed here; the viewer may see Dashboard and History, but cannot open Setup. Usernames are freely configurable and stored in plain text; passwords are hashed with Argon2id. 2FA is intended only for the admin.
translations.viewerNoSetup: The viewer has no access to Setup or 2FA.
translations.financeHint: These values are used for consumption costs, savings and amortization in the dashboard. Grid export is not compensated.
translations.feedInNotPaidHint: Grid export is valued at 0. The battery analysis uses exported surplus as potential battery benefit.
translations.batteryEfficiencyHint: Conservative default: 85%. Adjust it to your battery's real round-trip efficiency.
translations.batteryPayback: Battery payback without open BPS remainder
translations.batteryNotWorthwhile: Battery does not appear worthwhile yet
translations.batteryMissing: Enter battery price and capacity in setup.
translations.batteryAssumption: Assumption: grid export is unpaid, the battery round-trip efficiency configured in Setup is used, maximum one charge/discharge cycle per day. If the balcony PV system has not paid for itself yet, the open remainder is included.
translations.currencyHint: The currency is used for kWh price, investment costs, savings and amortization. No automatic conversion is performed.
translations.retentionHint: Raw measurements are kept only for the configured period. Daily aggregates are kept permanently and are used for total balance and amortization.
translations.piZeroModeActive: Pi Zero 2 W mode active: live values and raw data are limited to {hours} hours. Daily aggregates are preserved.
translations.liveDataLimitedHint: This mode shows only the latest {hours} hours of live values.
translations.backupHint: Creates an encrypted backup with database dump, configuration and backend data. The password is used only for this backup and is not stored.
translations.backupPasswordWarning: Without this password the backup cannot be restored.
translations.backupPasswordTooShort: The backup password must be at least 12 characters long.
translations.simulationHint: Generates realistic demo values without real devices. The maximum solar output caps PV power; day/night baseload defines the continuous household consumption. Spikes such as washing machine or coffee maker remain additional peaks.
translations.simulationPvPeakHint: Watts, for example 800 for a balcony PV system or 2000 for a larger real installation.
translations.simulationBaseloadHint: Continuous load in watts. Simulated consumption spikes are added on top of this baseload.
translations.simulationWarning: When simulation is enabled, dashboard, history, Kindle display, air data and JSON API show simulated values. Production data is not changed.
translations.matrixBanner: You are in the Matrix 😎 Simulation is running!
translations.resetValuesHint: Deletes all measurements, daily aggregates and volatile value caches. Devices, users and setup settings are kept.
translations.resetValuesWarning: Warning: This action cannot be undone. Type reset to confirm.
translations.publicDashboardHint: Enables a separate smart-meter style public meter view without login.
translations.publicDashboardDisabledHint: Only enable this if visitors may see these values without signing in.
translations.publicDashboardLoadFailed: Public dashboard could not be loaded
translations.currentValuesApiHint: Provides current BPSTracker values as JSON at /api/current-values. Disable this option if you do not use the endpoint.
translations.currentValuesApiDisabledHint: When disabled, /api/current-values does not return values.
translations.jsonPreviewHint: The preview calls the JSON API directly and shows the current response.
translations.kindleDisplayHint: Generates the Kindle PNG at /api/kindle/display.png. The image remains an optional public cache endpoint for Kindle fetches; refresh and meta are admin-only.
translations.kindleDisplayDisabledHint: When disabled, no new Kindle PNG is generated and the API reports that the display is disabled.
translations.kindlePreviewHint: The preview shows the current PNG exactly as the Kindle would fetch it.
translations.kindleLoadFailed: Kindle display could not be refreshed.
translations.airSensorHint: Optional sensor at /data.json. Temperature, humidity, PM10 (SDS_P1) and PM2.5 (SDS_P2) are shown only in the header; no history is stored.
translations.airSensorSaved: Air data sensor has been saved.
translations.devicePurposeHint: The purpose controls whether a Shelly is counted as grid/home import, solar feed-in, or only as a raw measuring device. Multiple solar/feed-in devices are summed.
translations.passwordEditHint: Leave empty = Shelly password remains unchanged.
translations.twoFaHint: The TOTP secret is stored encrypted. Recovery codes are stored only as hashes and can be used once instead of the 2FA code.
translations.twoFaEnabledMessage: 2FA has been enabled. Save the recovery codes now; they will not be shown again later.
translations.twoFaDisabledMessage: 2FA has been disabled. All recovery codes have been deleted.
translations.recoveryRegenerated: New recovery codes have been generated. Old codes are invalid.
translations.recoveryHint: Store these codes safely. Each code can be used only once and is not stored in plain text.
